text: I find myself in a meticulously designed and modern space, possibly a museum or research center. The atmosphere is clean and stimulating, with glass walls hinting at transparency of knowledge and purpose. The 'R+D' display occupies me—its bright, contrasting colors and the focus on research and development suggest a place of curiosity and forward thinking. I feel intellectually engaged, yet also a bit overwhelmed by the sterile precision all around. There’s a sense of anticipation, as if new ideas are waiting to be discovered just beyond the glass.
